a: An enumeration that represents the current Crash Detection event authorization state.
This is the designated app for receiving Crash Detection events.
The system denies the app from receiving Crash Detection events because another app has authorization.
There isn’t a designated app for receiving Crash Detection events.
The protocol that an object adopts to receive Crash Detection events and changes to the authorization status.
Describes the information about a vehicular crash.
An enumeration that defines possible emergency responses to a Crash Detection event.
The system attempted to dial the Emergency SOS - Call After Severe Crash provider.
The system couldn’t contact the Emergency SOS - Call After Severe Crash provider because the feature is off in the Settings app.
Provides registration and management of Crash Detection events.
The interface for receiving updates about a requested emergency response action.
Provides actions in response to a Crash Detection event.
An enumeration that defines the status of a requested voice call.
The system successfully placed a call to the desired contact and that call is currently active.
The system is dialing the desired contact.
The voice call to the desired contact disconnected.
The voice call failed to connect to the desired contact.
An error reported by SafetyKit.
Codes for identifying errors in SafetyKit.
The passed argument is invalid.
The system restricts the feature on this iPhone at the current time.
The app isn’t authorized to perform the requested operation.
The requested operation failed; retrying may succeed.
The domain for error objects that SafetyKit produces.
Detect and respond to car crash events in your app.
A value that indicates if the person authorized the app to receive Crash Detection events.
Receive and process a Crash Detection event.
The date and time the crash occurred.
The object that receives Crash Detection events.
The object that receives voice call status updates and requested emergency response actions.
Request the system to dial a voice call on behalf of someone involved in a crash.
Provides the voice call status to the delegate.
The method received an argument that it can’t validate.
A Boolean value that indicates if Crash Detection is available.
The longitude and latitude where the crash detection occurred.
The system currently restricts the feature on this device.
The system denies the app from performing the requested operation.
The requested operation failed; retrying may succeed.
Requests permission to access Crash Detection information.
An indication of whether the system attempted to call an Emergency SOS provider.
